Factsheet

Developer:
Mársen Studios
Based in Sweden
Release date:
Platforms:
Steam (PC)
Website:
store.steampowered.com/app/4210400/Lounge_Caf/
Regular Price:
USD 16.99 (Early Access)

Request Press Copy

Description

Lounge Café is an atmospheric coffee shop simulator where you play as Sara, a girl from Lucerne who moves to the coffee-centric city of Binoville in eastern Switzerland. After purchasing a small café, Sara begins her journey as a barista – choosing beans, selecting ingredients, crafting drinks, and trying to turn her place into the best spot in the city. One day, she is visited by a representative from a well-known organization who invites her to participate in a large citywide competition between cafés. The competition lasts for several months, and the main goal is to gain enough reputation and win the grand prize — proving that Sara's café truly deserves the title of the best in the entire city.

History

Features

  • Semi-realistic coffee brewing mechanics: choose beans, milk, syrups, and spices
  • Atmospheric café simulator set in the fictional Swiss city of Binoville
  • Story-driven narrative with unique characters and a citywide competition
  • Manage prices, balance expenses, and react to market changes
  • Original lo-fi inspired soundtrack
  • 13 explorable districts of Binoville (coming in updates)

Release Date
Q4 2026 (Early Access) .
Free Prologue
A free story-driven prequel is available on Steam — play as Christian, a retiring café owner, before the events of the main game. store.steampowered.com.

About Mársen Studios

Boilerplate
Mársen Studios is a small independent game studio based in Sweden. We are currently developing our debut title "Lounge Café".
